title: Are we really positive Asuka is a girl
display_title: Are we really positive Asuka is a girl
wikitext:
[]: Are we really positive Asuka is a girl? Post by RMZX » Mon Sep 06, 2010 2:38 am Yeah, i know what you're thinking "Of course Asuka is a chick, she has boobs stupid. what more do you need to see?" But in all honesty... What the hell is wrong with this image? (I had to take it from youtube vs. my DVD because for some reason taking a screenshot of the Video is not allowed.) I don't know about you, but I see some sort of protrusion from Asukas lower body.

[]: Post by TehDonutKing » Mon Sep 06, 2010 3:00 am QUALITY

[]: Post by RMZX » Mon Sep 06, 2010 3:05 am Thanks for that ever so enlightening post.

[]: Re: Are we really positive Asuka is a girl? Post by esselfortium » Mon Sep 06, 2010 3:16 am RMZX wrote: I don't know about you, but I see some sort of protrusion from Asukas lower body.

[]: Post by InstrumentalityOne » Mon Sep 06, 2010 5:00 am That´s a NERV monitoring entry plug. It monitors bodily functions, injuries and such.

[]: Post by Allemann » Mon Sep 06, 2010 7:08 am Her water broke.

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Sep 06, 2010 8:34 am It is shown in episode 27 of the series that Asuka had been a boy and even she wasn't aware of it. Yui had planned it, being the evil woman that she is or was.

[]: Post by Holy Diver » Mon Sep 06, 2010 10:21 am I think there's been at least one doujin that used this as a plot point... Not that I'd know.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Sep 06, 2010 10:29 am This thread sucks.

[]: Post by oOoOoOo » Mon Sep 06, 2010 10:31 am I'm just guessing this is what you're seeing . If you're seventeen and you've never seen a vagina before, you should probably watch more porn.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Sep 06, 2010 10:39 am oOoOoOo wrote: I'm just guessing this is what you're seeing . If you're seventeen and you've never seen a vagina before, you should probably watch more porn.

[]: Post by TehDonutKing » Mon Sep 06, 2010 10:42 am RMZX wrote: Thanks for that ever so enlightening post.

[]: Post by oOoOoOo » Mon Sep 06, 2010 10:49 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Nicely played.

[]: Exactly, you should [witty observation] melting icecaps. Post by Killer Bee » Mon Sep 06, 2010 10:51 am The Eva Monkey wrote: This thread sucks.

[]: Re: Exactly, you should [witty observation] melting icecaps. Post by oOoOoOo » Mon Sep 06, 2010 10:54 am Killer Bee wrote: Does this mean Rei's a muggle?

[]: Post by RMZX » Mon Sep 06, 2010 12:36 pm alright point taken, you can kill the thread now.

[]: Post by ran1 » Mon Sep 06, 2010 12:53 pm You're the best, O-chan. Also, this could be filed under the fanservice category.

[]: Post by Synapsid » Mon Sep 06, 2010 1:45 pm Killer Bee wrote: But then again, this is a thread about Asuka's vagina, so...

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Sep 06, 2010 1:49 pm Synapsid wrote: You know, if you "tuck and tape" the result doesn't look incredibly different, especialy if something like leggings are involved, so it's not possible to be absolutely sure here.
